text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, the Tracen Academy student council is
holding a holiday party for the student body.

text_block_list.name: Helios and Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Happy, happy holidays! ☆
Let's get this party started!

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I-i-i-it's like this whole party is a present just for me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All the academy's top Umas crowded together in
one place! Almost brushing up against
me—hhhggggk! I feel like the gods might smite
me for simply being here and breathing the same
air...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right! Sorry for the wait, everyone! Let's get
this present swap started!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Take the gift you brought and shuffle it in with
the rest. Afterwards, take a different one for
yourself! Hope you all get a good one!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oooooh! I want that one... and this one... and that
one too. I want 'em all!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
After nearly racking my brains to the point of
failure, I settled on this one. Hehe. Of course, I'll
treasure it forever, no matter who it's from.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I mean, getting a present from one of my precious
Umas... It's like I'm already in heaven.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Not to mention I get to do all this with my mega
simp trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital couldn't be happier. At last, it's
time to open the presents.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ready, everyone? We're all gonna open our gifts
at the same time.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Three, two, one... Open!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ooh, what could it be?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital tears open the wrapping paper and
opens the box inside to reveal...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: A calculator... I got a calculator!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe it! Never in my wildest dreams
would I—ohoohoohoooo!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Not especially. But if it's from an Uma, how could
I not be thrilled?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can use it to keep my stats straight when I'm
calculating Uma fic ideas before bed. I wonder
who it's from...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: That would be me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Shakur!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Of course it would be you. A calculator is such a Shakur gift. Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I didn't think it'd go to someone who joined the
academy the same time as me. The odds of you
getting my gift were barely over one percent...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if there's some kismet at work. If that's
the case, I have another present to go along with
the first.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat? A bonus?! Are you a goddess in the
flesh? Um, may I ask what it is?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Heh, sure.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: It's a challenge. You and me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Sh-Shakur?! But... you've never shown any interest
in me before...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
"Before" being the key word. That all changed
after I saw you run this year.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Your performance isn't affected by track type...
I'm curious to see how that works.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... It's wild I never noticed there was
someone this interesting in my own gen.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'll take you out for some partner running, so
lemme collect your data.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Whooooa! Am I dreaming?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Amaterasu has finally stepped out from her cave!
The whole world is bathed in light!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Now, hold on one second, Shakur.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Digital is a very valuable resource in my ongoing
experiments. You can't just borrow her whenever
you please.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Why, you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital's roommate, Agnes Tachyon, pokes
her head into the conversation.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Tch. Back off. This's got nothin' to do with you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I refuse. Digital is mine, thank you. As her
roommate, I reserve the preferential rights to her
usage.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Don't think you're some kinda big shot just 'cause
you've known her longer. She's comin' with me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wh-wh-wh-what's happening?! I'm sure there's
been some misunderstanding!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: This is... the taboo-iest of taboos. The two of them... and me caught in the middle...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ooh... A gust of wind could knock me over...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital seems delighted to have so many
Umamusume showing interest in her.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's an... autograph book... And it's got a bunch of
—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Whaaaaa?! It has everyone's autograph?! Omigarrrrgh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wh-wh-what a gem! An heirloom! No—an
indisputable national treasure!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
This would go for no less than a million
Umapoints at auction. How in the world did such
an astounding item fall into my lap?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm pleased to see you like it, Agnes Digital.
Everyone prepared this gift together.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: P-P-P-President?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You've won over countless Umamusume fans with
your eclectic running style.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Consequently, our appeal is broader and more
impactful than before. The contribution you've
made to Tracen Academy is of great weight and
merit.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We initially considered giving you an official
commendation, but you have rather more...
idiosyncratic preferences, if I recall correctly.
Therefore...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We figured you might be happier with a gift of
this sort. Think of it as a modest symbol of our
appreciation.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: O-o-omg I just asdhjkhkAAAA!

text_block_list.name: Fuji and Opera O
text_block_list.text: Happy holidays, Agnes Digital!

text_block_list.name: Doto and Urara
text_block_list.text: Happy holidays, Agnes Digital!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Waaaah... Trainer... Trai—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: HYAAAAAGGGHHH!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(I can see... the gates of Paradise... opening
before me...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A long cry of pure joy resonates through the sky
on this festive night. It is the most blissful
celebration that Agnes Digital has ever
experienced.
